hypothesis: Repeated backtest experiments can be prevented from drifting away from production by making production/backtest parity an explicit contract, ticket field, log field, and test expectation.

alpha_hypothesis.statement: Future alpha experiments are more trustworthy when executable trade logic is forced into shared policy modules instead of being implemented only in backtester.py.

why_not_direct_alpha_search: The immediately preceding accepted add-on alpha exposed a production parity gap. This run installs the governance layer that prevents the same class of backtester-only result from recurring.

conflicts_found.issue: Described LLM as final discretion and showed older output schema/strategy constants.
conflicts_found.resolution: Updated README to defer strategy truth to AGENTS/backtesting/parity docs and current constants; added add_on_trades schema mention.

conflicts_found.issue: Documented old standalone pipeline as if it were current production.
conflicts_found.resolution: Marked as legacy module context and pointed current production docs to quant/run.py and parity docs.

changes: Added docs/production_backtest_parity.md as the shared production/backtest parity contract.
Added AGENTS.md rule 6.1.1 banning backtester-only strategy logic.
Updated docs/backtesting.md with a production parity check before accepting strategy changes.
Updated experiment ticket and log schemas to require production_impact for executable trade behavior.
Updated README and legacy news_collector README to resolve stale guidance.
Added a parity constant guard test to quant/test_production_parity.py.

validation.backtest: not run; docs/governance/test-only change with no strategy behavior change

main_risk: The contract only works if future agents obey the required production_impact field and keep parity tests updated when adding new policy modules.
